privileged_info_summary: Auction bid analyzer task uses synthetic data with 9 unique items (after deduplication). Win rate is 55.56% (5 wins), total spending on won items is $3,190. Seven items exhibit high-risk bidding (ratio >= 0.8). Categories are inconsistent with only 44.4% standardization (4 lowercase, 2 uppercase, 3 mixed case). Three items have missing shipping costs. Task timeout is 240 seconds with 15 max steps.
